title: bartlettina matudae
intro: Bartlettina matudae, also known as 'Guatemalan Bartlettina', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bartlettina matudae include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making a tea or infusion from its leaves, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
